episodes.title: Behind the Investigation: "Andrew Tate’s Empire of Abuse" | The New Yorker
episodes.description:
The New Yorker staff writer Heidi Blake investigates how Andrew Tate abused and exploited women, drawing on exclusive interviews with Tate and his brother, Tristan; accounts from more than a dozen alleged victims; and thousands of leaked files.

Read "Andrew Tate’s Empire of Abuse" by Heidi Blake: https://www.newyorker.com/magazine/2026/06/15/andrew-tates-empire-of-abuse

episodes.title: How Julie K. Brown Caught Jeffrey Epstein | The New Yorker Festival
episodes.description:
The investigative journalist Julie K. Brown discusses reporting on the long-dormant case against Jeffrey Epstein—and how it ultimately led to his conviction.

Still haven’t subscribed to The New Yorker on YouTube ►►
